product.title: Almay Anti-Aging Foundation, Smart Shade Face Makeup with Hyaluronic Acid, Niacinamide, Vitamin C & E, Hypoallergenic-Fragrance Free, 200 Light Medium, 1 Fl Oz (Pack of 1)
featureBullets: BUILDABLE NATURAL FINISH FOUNDATION: Lightweight, buildable-coverage liquid foundation delivers your ideal shade match while reviving skin for a smooth, replenished look in just two weeks
SKIN TONE MATCHING MAKEUP: Skin tone matching shades turn from white to your ideal shade as you blend, Each color-adjusting face makeup shade is flexible across a range of skin tones

SKIN-CARING INGREDIENTS: The new and improved Smart Shade Foundation includes niacinamide to help even skin tone and reduce the appearance of discoloration, and hyaluronic acid to hydrate and plump the look of skin
FORMULATED WITHOUT: Formulated without added parabens, mineral oil, DMDM Hydantoin, and palm oils
SUITABLE FOR SENSITIVE SKIN: As part of the Almay promise, this product is hypoallergenic as well as dermatologist tested, clean, cruelty free, and fragrance free
product.description: Almay’s new and improved hypoallergenic Smart Shade Foundation delivers your perfect shade match while encouraging you to embrace your skin no matter your age. The lightweight, medium-coverage, natural finish liquid foundation starts out white (like its predecessor) and transforms to your ideal shade as you blend. The formula now has a skin-reviving complex made up of a team of skin-caring ingredients that work to replenish, smooth, and protect skin. Niacinamide helps even skin tone and reduce the appearance of discoloration. Hyaluronic acid hydrates and plumps the look of skin. Electrolytes contribute to well-balanced skin and help skin retain its moisture. Vitamins C and E protect against environmental aggressors. Upon application skin looks fresh and feels moisturized and comfortable—no caking. In just two weeks, skin appears lifted and smooth, and wrinkles appear minimized. Plus, not only is Ageless Smart Shade Foundation gentle on skin, it is gentle on the earth. The cap is made from 90% PCR material and the tube is made from 72% PCR material. As always, this Almay product is suitable for sensitive skin, hypoallergenic, dermatologist tested, clean, cruelty free, and fragrance free. It is also formulated without added parabens, mineral oil, DMDM Hydantoin, and palm oils.

specification.value: BUILDABLE NATURAL FINISH FOUNDATION, SKIN TONE MATCHING MAKEUP
#4,762 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #55 in Foundation Makeup

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find this foundation effective for mature skin, providing good coverage with a small amount and blending nicely on the skin. The product receives positive feedback for its lightweight feel, smooth texture, and natural look, with one customer noting it keeps skin hydrated all day. The color match receives mixed reviews, with some customers finding it a great match for their skin tone while others say it's too dark.

reviews.reviewTitle: Great foundation with no hives or allergies.
reviews.reviewText: Love this foundation, not itching or breaking out in hives and the color is perfect. Blends really nice with my skin tone (ultra white) goes on soft and smooth, covers what I need it to. It's like I am not wearing makeup. Almost didn't get it because some of the reviews stated it was too dark. If it blends in my skin it's not dark as I am glow in the dark white. Sunburn real easy. I didn't see if it had any sun protection but I usually put on sun protection anyway, wait 15 minutes, then apply makeup. AZ sun even on cloudy days will burn skin. It's perfect in price, color, and size, works excellent.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on November 24, 2025

reviews.reviewTitle: Light (not cakey), firms & smooths, matches skin tone with a fresh look. Great Value for $$
reviews.reviewText: Love this foundation. It goes on smooth, firms and tightens skin. Not heavy, looks fresh, and never cakey. Once applied it matches your skin tone automatically. It is well worth the cost and a fantastic value for the money. Highly recommend.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on January 20, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Lightweight but too dark and orangey
reviews.reviewText: Blends well, but the tints run dark! I had to go two shades lighter, one shade lighter in the summer. Light coverage that looks natural.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on September 25, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I’m nearly 50 years old and my preferred makeup style is simple, moisturizing primer, a basic foundation, fill the eyebrows a touch, a tinted lip balm, and maybe some blush if I feel pale. I’ve tried most big brands of foundations, from drugstore brands up to the most expensive department store items, but never really found an ideal match in a comfortable foundation until trying this product. I have cool-toned, fair combination skin and most foundations look and feel too thick, settling into pores and creases. My skin is also pretty sensitive, so I avoid anything with scents or heavy consistencies because they can cause rashes and breakouts. This foundation is almost white out of the tube but after application and light blending, it matches my skin perfectly and evens my skin tone very well. It feels light and not at all sticky or heavy. I can’t feel it any more than my moisturizer. While I wouldn’t consider it to be moisturizing on its own, it’s not drying at all. The big test for me today was a visit to the dentist. After X-rays and cleaning, the foundation hadn’t rubbed off or gathered in spots, as I’ve come to expect from almost every brand. My skin still appeared soft and healthy with consistent coloration and texture. This has become my daily foundation and I see no reason to swap to anything else. The price here is far better than any competitors as well. I’ve seen some mention that the color didn’t match their skin well. I would advise that you still need to choose the right tone for your skin. I couldn’t apply a dark or warm tone to my pale cool skin and expect it to match. I do hope they’ll release a broader range of colors for a more diverse group of customers as it’s still pretty limited to light skin tones.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 11, 2024

reviews.reviewTitle: Best foundation on the market!! 66 yrs old and it covers everything and I look younger!
reviews.reviewText: I'm in LOVE LOVE LOVE with this foundation. I am soon to be 67 and this makeup is fantastic. It's smooth and doesn't cake up or gather in your wrinkles. I had been in the hospital for a month and my face looked really horrible. I went to my ladies coffee club soon after getting home. I used this foundation in the color "light medium mine" and I got so many compliments on how fresh I looked..... even those who didn't know I had been in the hospital were complimenting me on my makeup!! I love this and am ordering more to have as backup!!
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 20, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Light coverage with a little healthy glow.
reviews.reviewText: I like that it gives your skin a nice healthy glow and light coverage. Not heavy at all and looks natural. Does not give full coverage or buildable coverage so not too good when blemishes pop up or if you want a better coverage foundation
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on September 8, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I really love this product—it blends seamlessly with your skin tone and feels incredibly natural. It doesn’t leave that heavy, layered feeling on your skin, which is a huge plus. The price is a great deal for such a high-quality product.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 19, 2026

reviews.reviewText: Goes on white until blended. Matches my skin tone well and is easy to apply. Not full coverage but not no coverage either.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on March 12, 2026

reviews.reviewText: This product turned my skin orange. Great for Halloween but I couldn't wear it any other time. soo disappointed.

reviews.reviewTitle: The item is used, not new
reviews.reviewText: I received a used item. Scratched half-empty bottle is stated as NEW in the description. Besides it has strange smell (like expired) though it should be fragrance-free.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United Arab Emirates on July 15, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Ideal for the minimal look, covers well to your complexion. I have used the product for any years and I have never been disappointed with the light feeling of makeup on my face.
